mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in < 40% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth indicates robust corporate hiring and consumer spending, directly boosting corporate earnings and equity valuations over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.05 over any 1-year rolling window for PAYEMS-driven signals

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and consumer spending signals strong aggregate demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient < 0.1 in OLS regression of 60d returns on GDPC1-RSAFS joint movements

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates above 4.5%, lead to higher discount rates and reduced equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in < 30% of triggered instances despite positive signal

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improved manufacturing activity, increasing corporate profits and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 for INDPRO-driven signals in 20d rolling windows

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts indicate reduced construction activity and weaker consumer confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in < 25% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in unemployment and wage growth signal a tight labor market with contained inflation, creating positive equity returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient > 0.2 in OLS regression of 60d returns on UNRATE-CPIAUCSL joint movements

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production combined with low capacity utilization signals underutilized resources, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days as firms expand.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 2% and UNRATE falls > 0.5pp in 3 months
failure_condition: Joint signal effectiveness drops below 15% in 20d forward returns during expansionary cycles
